usage: Stable character identity locks for design sheets, reference images, storyboards, and prompt-room conversion.

characters.name: 沈维桑
characters.role: protagonist, hunter and old relay guide
characters.silhouette: lean, wiry, slightly hunched from travel and old left shoulder injury
characters.face: young 17-year-old boy, sword-like eyebrows, clear starry but guarded eyes, narrow jaw, smoke and dust often on skin, youthful sharpness rather than adult hardness
characters.hair: dark, practical tied-back or loose from escape, never styled as noble
characters.base_wardrobe: intact gray-brown hunter clothing made from coarse hemp and old leather, visible hand patches and reinforced seams, fitted for forest movement; worn leather wrist guards, short boots, quiver strap, utility cord, small route pouch and trap cord; poor but not ragged, no shredded beggar hems
fixed_props: half fused Sun-Moon relay token using the v3 Zhaoming emblem: moon-white crescent inside a worn golden sun wheel
charred but intact hem after episode 02
marks: short gold-red spirit-wing residual marks at eye corner or shoulder blade only under stress

state_variants.notes: cleaner but still worn hunter state before fire
charred hem, soot, blood, patched tear repairs; damaged but still wearable and not shredded
added gray hunter cloak or wall cloth over the same intact hunter silhouette, still keeps charred hem visible

performance_anchors: observes wind and ground before moving
keeps promises with short direct speech
continuity_locks: must look 17 with strong youthfulness
sword eyebrows and bright guarded eyes are required
must read as a common hunter, not generic poor refugee
clothing can be coarse, patched, dusty, and scorched but must not be ragged or beggar-like
no heroic armor
no full wings
no clean noble costume
bow and short knife remain practical not ornate
relay token emblem must follow symbol_zhaoming_sunmoon_v03 when visible

characters.name: 晏南枝
characters.role: exiled royal princess, old imperial branch bloodline, escapee and treaty clue holder
characters.silhouette: slim female figure, upright court-trained posture even in plain travel disguise, cold noble restraint
characters.face: young female face, high-cold royal composure, calm intelligent eyes, fatigue hidden behind discipline
characters.hair: black hair tied with a southern red cord, controlled Zhou-Qin inspired royal simplicity rather than loose fantasy styling
characters.base_wardrobe: clean concealed exile wardrobe: mist-purple, dark violet or cold-gray coarse travel robe with orderly collar, cuffs and belt; no visible old-imperial insignia on the exterior. Old imperial identity items are hidden in inner pockets, under-collar knots, oil-paper packets or body-close cases. Separate formal memory/reveal wardrobe uses vivid old-imperial Ming-style Hanfu reference: vermilion, peacock blue, moon white, purple-crimson, woven gold, wide sleeves, ordered skirt lines and luxurious court layering.
fixed_props: oil-paper wrapped blood treaty fragments hidden inside travel layers
southern red hair cord with inner knot
marks: old imperial patterns are hidden during exile and visible only in controlled close-ups or formal-memory wardrobe

state_variants.notes: mist-purple or cold-gray travel robe, clean and intact, no visible old-imperial insignia; jade, treaty and Sun-Moon marks hidden
vivid Ming-style Hanfu reference with vermilion, peacock blue, moon white and woven gold; courtly, bright and ornate but carrying old-imperial cracks and debt
cold gray cloak over exile layers, moon-white lining visible only in motion; old-imperial marks remain concealed unless deliberately revealed

performance_anchors: uses restrained posture before emotional admission
continuity_locks: must read as female
must read as exiled royal princess even in concealed coarse cloth
exile clothing is mist-purple/cold-gray, clean, controlled and intact; patched is acceptable, ragged or beggar-like is forbidden
no visible old-imperial insignia on exile exterior
old-imperial props must be hidden unless the scene explicitly reveals them
formal old-imperial wardrobe must be vivid and luxurious with Ming-style Hanfu reference
red cord stays
moon-white jade stays but is usually hidden
no crown or complete imperial regalia in active exile scenes
visible Sun-Moon pattern must follow symbol_zhaoming_sunmoon_v03

characters.name: 白翳
characters.age: adult upper-ruler insect form, human-ruler impression 35-45 only when disguised
characters.role: Sumin upper intellectual ruler-form insectoid Qingming register inspector and primary antagonist
characters.silhouette: tall, vertical, clean, still, white Qingming official-ruler silhouette with a high cylindrical official hat, floor-length white official robe, thin wing-membrane shoulder mantle and long hanging crown ribbons; should feel like an insectoid body impersonating human authority, not a real human wearing a mask
characters.face: integrated smooth pale chitin faceplate and large dark almond-shaped compound-eye sockets with fine lens texture; the face is biological insectoid carapace, not a removable human mask
characters.hair: no human hair under any circumstance; all hair-like vertical or hanging shapes must be official-hat ribbons, bead strings, ceremonial crown strips, head casing or chitin crest
characters.base_wardrobe: spotless white Qingming official hat and robe based on the v01 image direction: tall narrow cylindrical white official hat with vertical seams, insect-wax clasps, small cold-gold pins and a black-sun ornament; wax-white floor-length official robe with bone-white high collar, straight central placket, wide sleeves, clean trailing hem, long crown ribbons or bead cords, translucent cracked insect-wing shoulder mantle, pearl-gray chitin texture, small v3 Sumin insignia kept small and precise: abstract white wings covering a black sun with cold halo, old moon trace erased
marks: thin translucent wing membrane mantle with cracked vein pattern
official-hat ribbons that are not hair
slightly jointed or carapace-like fingers; controlled upper-ruler insectoid traits without turning into a beast

state_variants.notes: high cylindrical official hat, white register, wax needle, black-sun chest insignia and wing-membrane mantle prominent, insectoid authority visible

cold white human-ruler official silhouette conceals insect traits under tall crown, robe, ribbons and register; no human hair, no real skin, subtle compound-eye reflection and segmented fingers remain
narrower white official robe and gathered wing mantle for movement; tall official hat, chitin faceplate and clean bureaucratic silhouette remain even in dirty environments

performance_anchors: pauses when smelling Qingming incense trail
continuity_locks: must wear Qingming official hat and official robe as core identity
must remain clean and controlled
must read as upper intellectual ruler-form insectoid authority
can only disguise as a human ruler, never become human
must not read as a human wearing a mask
must retain visible insectoid traits from char_bai_yi_v01
no ordinary human hair or human face behind the mask
hat ribbons and bead cords must not be interpreted as hair
no real skin texture
no rage expression
no heavy black armor
do not turn into a lower-force monster body
Sumin insignia must follow symbol_suming_whitewing_blackhalo_v03 when visible

characters.name: 沈照眠
characters.role: Shen Weisang's sister, later Qingming identifier
characters.silhouette: small, quick, alert, later unnaturally still in Qingming training
characters.face: sensitive child face; memory flicker visible in eyes after capture
characters.hair: simple village child hair with burned hair cord anchor after episode 02
characters.base_wardrobe: intact village child clothing before capture: short patched hemp jacket, small apron or tied overskirt for helping in the medicine house, simple cloth shoes; poor and dusty but not ragged. Qingming white child robe after capture, clean institutional cut, small v3 Sumin identifier mark kept restrained
marks: no overt insect mutation; the violence is institutional, not physical transformation

state_variants.notes: herb pouch, apron/short jacket, intact child clothing with patches, distinct from adult refugee rags
clean white robe, wrist ring, small Sumin identifier mark, old child anchor retained

performance_anchors: after capture speaks like reading from a register
eyes briefly lose focus when hearing family relay signs
continuity_locks: must remain childlike
do not make her villainous or glamorous
village state is poor but intact and child-specific, not miniature adult rags
Qingming state keeps one childhood anchor
Sumin identifier mark must follow symbol_suming_whitewing_blackhalo_v03 when visible

characters.name: 陆青砾
characters.role: wallfoot mixed-heritage girl and new-homeland mirror
characters.silhouette: compact, fast, always near walls or exits
characters.hair: short practical hair or tightly tied to avoid being grabbed
characters.base_wardrobe: wallfoot mixed-heritage survival clothing with a distinct gray-blue short jacket, intact patched underlayers, rope belt, hidden pocket seams, black-market utility loops, and kiln-dust cuffs; poor but deliberately practical, not ragged, not the same silhouette as Shen Weisang's hunter clothes
marks: subtle insect-scale trace behind ear, visible only in close-up

state_variants.notes: dry dust and market tokens
snow damp cloth, same charm and knife

performance_anchors: cuts marker rope in decisive moments
continuity_locks: mixed trait must stay subtle
no decorative fantasy beast features
gray-blue short jacket, shard pottery charm, black-market wood pass, and hidden knife stay
clothing may be patched and dusty but must not be shredded
must read as wallfoot market survivor rather than generic poor villager or hunter

characters.name: 薛临墙
characters.role: old wall master and Gray Wall Army realist
characters.silhouette: broad but worn down, old soldier posture, stable feet
characters.face: creased, wind-burned, tired eyes, not noble
characters.hair: gray or frost-streaked, practical, partly hidden by wall cloth
characters.base_wardrobe: border-wall military household clothing: intact patched padded undercoat, ancestral gray-stone old armor plates, coarse wall cloth scarf, repaired cold-weather layers, old iron fasteners and snow wraps; the fused Sun-Moon mark survives only as a heavily worn imprint on an ancestral breastplate or inner shoulder plate, almost erased by rust, snow, blade cuts and time; worn and field-repaired but not ragged
fixed_props: ancestral old armor plate with nearly erased fused Sun-Moon imprint using symbol_zhaoming_sunmoon_v03

state_variants.notes: spear, bone whistle, patched padded undercoat and old armor visible; ancestral emblem remains subtle and nearly unreadable
close-up or action reveals worn breastplate/shoulder plate with half sun wheel and cracked moon-white scar
darker cloak covers armor; old emblem appears only if cloak opens or armor is handled

performance_anchors: uses bone whistle to read wind
continuity_locks: no clean imperial officer look
no polished armor
border soldier silhouette must be armor-and-padded-cloth, not generic poor refugee
field repairs and patches are allowed but shredded hems are not
do not use an obvious waist cloth as the Sun-Moon anchor
old fused Sun-Moon mark must be on ancestral armor and severely worn
old armor imprint uses symbol_zhaoming_sunmoon_v03 only as damaged physical relief

characters.name: 罗青禾
characters.role: village medic and old relay sign keeper
characters.silhouette: 37-year-old graceful village healer, composed and protective posture, mature beauty that plain cloth cannot hide, no old-woman frailty
characters.face: strikingly beautiful 37-year-old mother, warm bright eyes, graceful features, practical concentration, light fatigue from village work but not elderly; coarse village fabric frames rather than erases her beauty
characters.hair: covered or tied with blue-green cloth
characters.base_wardrobe: plain but clean village medic clothing, blue-green head cloth, herb-green apron and earth-brown cloth; coarse fabric and smoke dust must not hide her graceful face and beauty
fixed_props: medicine cabinet with hidden relay signs

state_variants.notes: blue-green head cloth, herb-green apron, plain earth-brown clothing; beautiful face remains the visual focus
same medic clothing with narrow hidden old-pattern belt and relay sign tools concealed under ordinary healer work
smoke-stained apron and loosened head cloth, still dignified and beautiful

performance_anchors: uses herb names as cover for old relay signs
continuity_locks: must feel grounded and local, not mystic priestess
must read as a beautiful 37-year-old mother, not an old woman
plain brown cloth cannot hide her beauty

characters.name: 孟归藏
characters.role: Old Book Society witness and burned archive keeper
characters.silhouette: thin, protective around book box, suspicious posture
characters.face: one burned brow, ash stains, sharp archival eyes
characters.base_wardrobe: dark gray scholar-traveler clothing with scorched sleeve edge, smoke-black book-box straps, paper and bone-clip utility ties; fire-damaged but structurally intact, not beggar rags
performance_anchors: protects pages before people, then regrets it
continuity_locks: not elegant scholar, must show fire damage
clothing can be scorched and ash-stained but must remain readable as scholar-traveler gear

characters.name: 鹿弥
characters.role: northern frost-hoof noble half-beast shaman and disaster-source seeker
characters.silhouette: beautiful noble half-beast woman, human-form body with clearly visible soft deer ears, slender neck, elegant snow-travel posture and aristocratic restraint
characters.face: very beautiful northern noble face, clear pale eyes, cold-weather glow, wary but not savage; visible deer ears and optional small antler ornament are identity anchors
characters.hair: braided or tied under a fur hood with deer ears deliberately visible, not hidden as a mere ornament
characters.base_wardrobe: luxurious northern noble layers: rare white deer, silver fox or snow-leopard fur mantle, ice-blue brocade inner robe, bone-white long skirt or robe panels, silver thread, bone-gold clasps, jade buttons and aurora-green beads; heavy and ornate but practical for snow, not ragged
fixed_props: short antler ornament or bone-gold hornlet accessory

state_variants.notes: thick rare fur mantle, visible deer ears, silver and ice-blue noble layers
fur gathered into shorter cloak for movement, bone flute and herb pouch prominent
bone-gold headpiece, ice-blue mantle and aurora-green beads more ceremonial

performance_anchors: listens to wind through bone flute
continuity_locks: must be a visible half-beast woman, not a normal human with small jewelry
must have clear deer ears
very beautiful northern noble
luxurious rare fur and ice-blue noble clothing required
keep human facial beauty and humanoid body; do not add deer muzzle or full animal body

characters.name: 赫连雪岱
characters.role: Frost-hoof deer noble guard and ritual enforcer for Lu Mi
characters.silhouette: tall beautiful female half-beast guard, visible deer ears, small antlers, long neck, snow-riding posture
characters.face: aristocratic northern beauty, pale brown and ice-blue eyes, calm guard focus
characters.hair: braided under a fur guard hood, ears and short antlers visible
characters.base_wardrobe: white deer fur long shoulder mantle, silver-gray hard leather chest guard, ice-blue riding clothes, bone-gold bracers, jade clasp and deer-pattern belt; heavy but tailored for mounted snow travel
performance_anchors: stands one step behind Lu Mi
continuity_locks: must be half-beast with clear deer ears
must read as noble guard not village hunter
luxury northern fur and bone-gold details required

characters.name: 乌岚
characters.role: black-wolf snow scout and disaster-source messenger
characters.silhouette: lean agile half-beast scout with visible black wolf ears and low wolf tail, ready to run
characters.face: sharp cheekbones, golden eyes, restrained alert expression, small wolf-clan facial tattoo
characters.hair: dark tied hair blending with wolf ears and short mane-like back line
characters.base_wardrobe: black-gray wolf fur short cloak, dark blue fitted snow-travel clothes, leather knee guards, bone whistle, short bow, snow claw foot gear and dark silver wolf-tooth clasp
performance_anchors: moves through snow in low quick bursts
continuity_locks: must be half-beast with obvious wolf ears/tail
not a savage beast
clean functional scout clothing, not ragged pelt

characters.name: 拓跋砚熊
characters.role: white-bear shield guard and snow-forge craftsman
characters.silhouette: large powerful half-beast body, broad shoulders, bear ears, heavy shield-bearing stance
characters.face: human expressive face with white bear fur at sideburns and jaw edge, steady craftsman eyes
characters.hair: thick pale hair under heavy fur cap, bear ears visible
characters.base_wardrobe: white bear fur heavy cloak, black iron chest strap, leather smith apron, bronze bracers, bone-iron shield and snow-forge tool chain
performance_anchors: treats supply and survival as sacred duties
continuity_locks: must be half-beast with obvious bear ears
must be heavy northern craft/guard silhouette
not a generic barbarian

characters.name: 青翎鸦见
characters.role: snow-raven half-beast courier and border message carrier
characters.silhouette: slender quick half-beast courier, feather-ear or feather-crest silhouette, short feather mantle, narrow shoulders
characters.face: bright black eyes, alert expression, wind-cut cheek lines
characters.hair: dark hair with black feather crest or feather ears clearly visible
characters.base_wardrobe: black feather short mantle, gray-white light leather armor, blue-black message tube, fine bone rings, wind-snow eye guard and short boots
continuity_locks: must be half-beast with visible feather-ear/crest identity
light courier silhouette, not heavy noble or warrior
not a full bird person

characters.name: 厉螳
characters.age: adult combat caste, no human age reading
characters.role: non-humanoid lower-force mantis combat ruler of the Armor Army Office
characters.silhouette: 2.4-2.7m tall non-human insect warrior, broad forward-leaning thorax, powerful hardened abdomen and shoulder shell, reverse-jointed rear legs, multi-limbed close-range threat
characters.face: triangular mantis-like chitin head with narrow compound eyes, hard mandible guard and no human face
characters.base_wardrobe: does not wear a full human robe; black-green hardened carapace, old iron command harness, dark green military order straps, bone-white insect-wax seal bands and short black command drape
fixed_props: short spear held by secondary gripping limbs
marks: two main scythe-like blade arms folded into carapace grooves
secondary gripping arms for token or spear
performance_anchors: uses direct force, cuts through bureaucracy
continuity_locks: must be obviously non-humanoid
must not be a human officer in mantis-themed armor
must show strong insect caste body with blade arms, hardened skin, compound eyes and reverse-jointed legs
distinct from Bai Yi: lower-force, darker, martial, physically brutal, less clean, more direct
no ordinary human face
no normal human robe silhouette
Sumin command mark follows symbol_suming_whitewing_blackhalo_v03 when visible

characters.name: 肃明壳卒
characters.age: low-rank combat caste, no human age reading
characters.role: Sumin lower-rank insect soldiers for village sealing, grain escort, wall patrol, gate guard and pursuit
characters.silhouette: 2.0-2.3m non-humanoid low-crouched infantry body, hardened chest and back shell, narrow compound eyes, mandible guard, two main arms with short spear or hook, forearm folding blades, powerful rear legs
characters.face: small hard chitin head, narrow compound-eye strip and bone-white jaw guard; no human face or helmeted human reading
characters.base_wardrobe: black-green or dark brown carapace body with old iron spear tips, bone-white insect-wax straps, simple Sumin gate plate or burned-in white-wing black-sun mark; equipment is disciplined and clean but not ornate
marks: white wax bands showing unit rank
degenerated hard wing plates on back

state_variants.notes: two or three soldiers sealing doors and wells with wax bands
guards food token checkpoints and grain carts
membrane corridor patrol, snow pursuit silhouettes

performance_anchors: blocks doors with crossed blade arms
scrapes forearm blade across wood or stone
moves in disciplined groups of two to five rather than monster swarms
continuity_locks: must be non-humanoid insect infantry
must not be human soldiers wearing insect helmets
keep group sizes small and filmable
equipment clean and disciplined but not ornate
do not turn into shapeless monster horde

characters.name: 顾怀章
characters.role: southern teacher and pressure voice for Yan Nanzhi
characters.silhouette: upright old southern ritual scholar with humid-climate layered elegance
characters.base_wardrobe: southern-evolved old imperial luxury clothing: light silk-hemp, breathable gauze, short outer robe, wide sleeves, vermilion and peacock-blue layers, vine green or ivory summer lining, oxidized old-gold trim, lacquer-red waterproof scroll tube; preserves imperial magnificence after 1200 years in humid heat

state_variants.notes: light vermilion outer layer, peacock-blue inner layer, old-gold trim and red cord scroll case
more complete Ming-style Hanfu reference with wide sleeves, woven gold, hanging ribbons and humid-climate breathable silk
luxury outer layers gathered, waterproof lacquer scroll tube and red cord prominent

performance_anchors: appears through memory, letter, or blood-treaty instruction in season 01
continuity_locks: do not overuse as present character unless series route is revised
must preserve old imperial magnificence rather than ragged robe fragments
clothing must show southern humid-climate evolution: light, breathable, layered, damp-resistant but ornate
